base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ui_multi_endings — a ui (cutscene) from 1995 chrono trigger. 13 multiple-ending cutscenes (based on when Lavos is defeated). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 13 multiple-ending cutscenes (based on when Lavos is defeated)
